text.title: AI-Assisted Single-Interview Analysis Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end with explicit decision-gates.

step.name: load-and-redact
step.action: Apply PII redaction; verify speaker labels + line numbers.

step.name: identify-contradictions
step.action: Pair conflicting statements within interview; record line ranges.

step.name: generate-followups
step.action: Write follow-up questions tied to specific contradictions or unfilled guide items.

step.name: verify-and-publish
step.action: Researcher checks every highlight against source; signs verified_by.
step.decision-gate: If any quote cannot be found in transcript, return to extract step.
